description: A large Baroque composition set within a classical temple with tall Corinthian columns framing the scene. At the center, a young woman in white -- Iphigenia -- kneels or stands at an altar, surrounded by robed priests and soldiers. A red banner or cloth billows dramatically overhead. To the left, a swirl of smoke or divine cloud erupts, suggesting supernatural intervention. Figures in rich classical and oriental dress observe from both sides. The composition is theatrical and dynamically arranged, with strong diagonals and a luminous sky visible between the columns.

_meta.title: Moses and the Tables of the Law
